question: Is the image a realistic photo of an airport security checkpoint area?
Is there exactly 1 light gray X-ray machine positioned on the left side of the frame?
Does the X-ray machine have a black rectangular opening with reflective edges?
Is there a black conveyor belt extending from right to left toward the X-ray machine?
Is there exactly 1 silver, reflective metal security gate frame in the middle background?
Are there exactly 2 silver stanchion posts (one on each side) in front of the security gate?
Are the stanchion posts connected by a black and white striped retractable belt forming a horizontal line?
Are there exactly 5 light gray plastic trays arranged in sequence on the conveyor belt?
Is the leftmost tray positioned close to the X-ray machine entrance?
Are there exactly 2 laptops side by side inside the leftmost tray?
Is the left laptop silver metal (closed) and the right laptop gold shell (closed) with visible internal structure?
Are there exactly 3 phones placed side by side at the front edge of the leftmost tray?
Are the phone cases colored black, white, and dark blue (fuzzy plush material) respectively?
Is there 1 set of scattered metal keys in the middle tray with a circular silver keyring and teeth pointing in different directions?
Are there exactly 2 analog watches positioned to the right of the keys in the middle tray?
Does one watch have a black dial with a brown leather strap, and the other a white dial with a black silicone strap?
Are there exactly 3 pairs of sneakers inside the rightmost tray?
Are the sneaker pairs colored white, gray, and black, all with mesh texture uppers?
Do the toe caps of all three pairs of sneakers point to the left?
Are there exactly 2 coiled belts positioned behind the sneakers?
Is one belt dark blue and the other semi-transparent silicone, both with metal buckles facing up?
Are there exactly 2 backpacks standing upright on the ground at the lower right of the frame?
Is one backpack charcoal gray coarse woven fabric and the other dark blue nylon fabric?
Are there exactly 2 jackets on the ground next to the backpacks: one dark gray (dragging) and one light khaki (bundled)?
Are there exactly 6 transparent plastic water bottles standing in a row in front of the backpacks?
Does the leftmost water bottle contain bright yellow liquid while the rest are colorless?
Are there exactly 2 passport holders positioned behind the water bottles?
Is there a burgundy leather passport holder (half open) and a brushed metal passport holder (closed, reflecting light)?
